es.short_description:
Personalized mobile massage services delivered to your home, hotel, or vacation rental throughout Miami.

Bilingual service in English and Spanish.5t
es.opening_hours_text:
Monday - Saturday: 10:00 AM - 9:00 PM
Sunday: 11:00 AM - 6:00 PM
es.service_area_text: Mobile massages services at homes, hotels, and vacation rentals throughout Miami-Dade County, including Miami, Miami Beach, Brickell, downtown Miami, Coral Gables and Aventura.

services.name: Relaxation & Wellness — Signature Relaxation Massage — Gentle-to-medium pressure for full-body relaxation, 60 minutes
Relaxation & Wellness — Signature Relaxation Massage — Extended full-body relaxation session, 90 minutes
Therapeutic & Recovery — Deep Tissue Massage — Focused pressure to relieve muscle tension and stiffness, 60 minutes
Therapeutic & Recovery — Deep Tissue Massage — Extended targeted treatment for chronic tension, 90 minutes
Therapeutic & Recovery — Sports Recovery Massage — Targeted massage for active clients, muscle recovery, and mobility, 6
Enhancements — Aromatherapy — Essential oils added to your massage session
Enhancements — Hot Towels and Scalp Massage — Warm towels followed by a relaxing scalp massage
Travel outside the standard Miami service area may require an additional fee based on location.

policies: Appointments are available by advance booking only. A 30% deposit is required to reserve your appointment, and the remaining balance is due at the time of service.
Please provide at least 24 hours’ notice to cancel or reschedule. Deposits are non-refundable for cancellations made less than 24 hours before the appointment.
Please disclose any injuries, allergies, pregnancy, recent surgeries, or relevant medical conditions before your session.

featured_package.name: Miami Reset Package — A 90-minute Signature Relaxation Massage with aromatherapy, hot towels, and a relaxing scalp massa
